channel.title: Andreas Halvorsen — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: ADDED META (+78%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) added META in Q4 2025 · 1.0% of portfolio. 37.53% add — Q4's biggest META buyer.

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: ADDED MSFT (+22%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) added MSFT in Q4 2025 · 4.8% of portfolio. Tiger-style quality compounder add.

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: ADDED NVDA (+18%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) added NVDA in Q4 2025 · 6.2% of portfolio. Still leaning into AI infrastructure.

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: ADDED TSM (+25%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) added TSM (TAIWAN SEMICONDUCTOR MFG LTD) in Q4 2025 · 4.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: TRIMMED SCHW (-16%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) trimmed SCHW (SCHWAB CHARLES CORP) in Q4 2025 · 3.7% of portfolio.

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: ADDED V (+38%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) added V (VISA INC) in Q4 2025 · 3.7% of portfolio.

item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) trimmed DHR (DISNEY WALT CO) in Q4 2025 · 3.4% of portfolio.

item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) added SHW (SHERWIN WILLIAMS CO) in Q4 2025 · 2.7% of portfolio.
